---
title: "Air Pollution & Ecobici in Mexico City"
---

## About this project

This is an end-to-end case study exploring the relationship between
air pollution and Ecobici bike-share usage in Mexico City, using only
public data.

The project demonstrates a full data pipeline: extraction, data quality
checks, exploratory analysis, methodological context, modeling, and
publication.

*Work in progress — this page is the first published slice.*
